channel.title: Azure Kubernetes Service on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Kubernetes Service on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Encryption in Transit for Azure Files NFS Shares in Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) now generally supports Encryption in Transit for Azure Files NFS v4.1 volumes through the Azure File CSI driver. When enabled, data transferred between AKS workloads and Azure Files NFS shares is encrypted in transit.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Azure Container Linux (ACL) now generally available on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
item.description:
Azure Container Linux (ACL) is now generally available for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) node pools. It provides a minimal, immutable, container-focused host OS based on Flatcar Container Linux and Azure Linux RPM packages.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Application Gateway for Containers managed add-on + AKS Automatic
item.description:
Azure AKS Automatic now supports the managed Application Gateway for Containers add-on in public preview. The update removes a previous limitation that prevented Application Gateway for Containers from being used with AKS Automatic.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: WireGuard In‑Transit Encryption for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
item.description:
WireGuard in-transit encryption is now generally available for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters that use Azure CNI powered by Cilium and Advanced Container Networking Services (ACNS). It provides transparent node-level encryption for traffic in transit.

  • Source: Azure Updates
